channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: StyleBop - Tue May 05 13:40:17 UTC 2026
item.description:
Open the current CSS file or workspace folder in StyleBop — a visual macOS editor for stylesheets. Right-click any .css file or folder and pick Open in StyleBop. The...
vendor: Ben Dansby downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.bendansby.stylebop

item.title: Markora - Tue May 05 10:19:50 UTC 2026
item.description:
Markora brings Notion-style WYSIWYG Markdown editing to JetBrains IDEs. Edit Markdown files in a block editor that renders as you type — no preview pane needed...
vendor: Markora downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.github.kenshin579.markora

item.title: HelionCoder - Tue May 05 13:32:20 UTC 2026
item.description:
HelionCoder brings the local HelionCoder CLI into JetBrains IDEs with a dark, VS Code-style assistant panel, editor-aware context, and real IDE integrations. Use it to...
vendor: GabrielPondC downloads: 2 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.helioncoder.jetbrains

item.title: Jarify - Mon May 04 21:12:32 UTC 2026
item.description:
Formatting and diagnostics for SQL via the jarify CLI. Reformat Code / format-on-save via jarify fmt Inline diagnostics via jarify lint --format json Auto-installs...
vendor: gmatter downloads: 1 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.amfaro.jarify

item.title: Jaspr | Dart Web Framework - Mon May 04 13:12:58 UTC 2026
item.description:
Adds Jaspr framework support to JetBrains IDEs. Jaspr is a web framework for Dart that lets you build type-safe, reactive web applications. This plugin integrates the...
vendor: Adrián Primo Bernat downloads: 5 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.github.eladrimonos.jasprintellij

item.title: Better Project Groups - Sun May 03 21:15:13 UTC 2026
item.description:
Allows adding a project to multiple groups in the 'Project Selection' welcome screen.
vendor: x3rt downloads: 3 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.x3rt.betterprojectgroups

item.title: GitCommitTool - Tue May 05 09:21:56 UTC 2026
item.description:
GitCommitTool - AI Commit Message Generator 中文介绍 GitCommitTool 是一款基于 AI 的 Git commit 信息生成插件，支持多 API 配置与自定义标签管理。 核心功能： AI 驱动生成 — 接入 OpenAI / DeepSeek / 通义千问 等大模型...
vendor: 杭州迦禾未来科技有限公司 downloads: 2 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.jiahefuture.git-commit-tool

item.title: Television - Tue May 05 19:25:34 UTC 2026
item.description:
Bring the speed and elegance of Television directly into your JetBrains IDE. This plugin integrates Television directly in IntelliJ IDEs, providing a fast and...
vendor: ckob downloads: 8 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: dev.ckob.television

item.title: Xonsh - Mon May 04 20:05:50 UTC 2026
item.description:
Xonsh shell script support for JetBrains IDEs, backed by xonsh-language-server via the LSP4IJ client. Syntax highlighting via a TextMate grammar recycled from...
vendor: Johan Grande downloads: 17 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: eu.nahoj.xonsh.jetbrains

item.title: GaussDB JDBC Driver - Mon May 04 19:54:33 UTC 2026
item.description:
Bundles and automatically installs the GaussDB JDBC driver into JetBrains DataGrip and other IntelliJ-based IDEs. GaussDB is a distributed relational database...
vendor: Vasilii Chernov downloads: 6 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.github.tjlee.gaussdbjdbcdriver

item.title: Jira Companion - Mon May 04 20:56:09 UTC 2026
item.description:
Keep Jira Cloud next to your code: look up issues, read descriptions and comments, and run searches from a tool window—without living in the browser. Issue detail...
